faq.question: Why is Taiwan so important for semiconductors?
faq.answer: TSMC (Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company) produces over 90% of the world's most advanced chips (sub-7nm). These chips power everything from iPhones to F-35 fighters to data centers running AI. No other facility on Earth can produce these chips at scale.

faq.question: Could chip production be moved elsewhere?
faq.answer: TSMC is building fabs in Arizona and Japan, but they won't match Taiwan's capacity for 5-10 years. A single advanced fab costs $20+ billion and takes 3-4 years to build. Taiwan has dozens of such fabs.

faq.question: Is the Taiwan Conflict Semiconductor Supply Impact Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard geopolitics and energy markets formulas trusted by analysts and informed citizens. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

faq.question: What disruption scenario should I enter?
faq.answer: Enter the most accurate disruption scenario value you have available. If you're estimating, use a conservative figure. You can always run the calculator again with different values to see how changes affect the results.

sections.title: What Is the Taiwan Conflict Semiconductor Supply Impact Calculator?
sections.body: The Taiwan Conflict Semiconductor Supply Impact Calculator is a free online tool designed for analysts and informed citizens who need quick, accurate calculations in the geopolitics and energy markets space. By entering your disruption scenario, duration, you get instant results including global chip supply lost, industries most affected, global gdp impact. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting global chip supply lost right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In geopolitics and energy markets, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by analysts and informed citizens worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to understand global dynamics with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your disruption scenario and need to find the right global chip supply lost. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.
